zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert II de Wavrin於1213年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦福林時，他的父親Hellin II De Wavrin23歲，母親Elisabeth De Montmirail18歲。他於1244年11月17日之後與Mathilde De Bethune結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1284年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德桑斯享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert II de Wavrin于1213年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦福林时，他的父亲Hellin II De Wavrin23岁，母亲Elisabeth De Montmirail18岁。他于1244年11月17日之后与Mathilde De Bethune结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1284年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德桑斯享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wavrin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert II de Wavrin was born in 1213, in Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Hellin II De Wavrin, was 23 and his mother, Elisabeth De Montmirail, was 18. He married Mathilde De Bethune after 17 November 1244. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1284, in Santes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert II de Wavrin est né en 1213, à Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hellin II De Wavrin, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth De Montmirail, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde De Bethune après 17 novembre 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1284, à Santes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert II de Wavrin 1213 in Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hellin II De Wavrin 23 und seine Mutter Elisabeth De Montmirail 18. Er hat nach 17. November 1244 Mathilde De Bethune geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1284 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Santes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert II de Wavrin è nato il nel 1213 nel Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Hellin II De Wavrin, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth De Montmirail, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde De Bethune dopo il 17 novembre 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1284, nel Santes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert II de Wavrinが1213年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードワvリンで生まれた時，父Hellin II De Wavrinは23歳，母Elisabeth De Montmirailは18歳であった。1244年11月17日以後にMathilde De Bethuneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1284年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードサンツで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert II de Wavrin(이)가 1213년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 와브린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hellin II De Wavrin(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth De Montmirail(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1244년 11월 17일 이후 Mathilde De Bethune(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 산티스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert II de Wavrin nasceu em 1213, em Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hellin II De Wavrin, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth De Montmirail, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde De Bethune após 17 de novembro de 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1284, em Santes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert II de Wavrin родился в 1213 г. в местности ваврин, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Hellin II De Wavrin было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth De Montmirail, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde De Bethune после 17 ноябрь 1244 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1284 г. в местности сантесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert II de Wavrin nació en 1213, en Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hellin II De Wavrin, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elisabeth De Montmirail, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mathilde De Bethune después de 17 de noviembre de 1244. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1284, en Santes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
